历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 4880→5198→4425→5356→3934, with significant fluctuations; in 2025, the ranking moved sharply forward to 3934, the highest level in recent years; the enrollment plan was 8 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 9 in 2025; the 2026 enrollment plan file was not read, so it is considered unchanged by rule, with competitive pressure similar to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 ranking being at a recent high, the enrollment plan remaining unchanged, and the increase in the number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 3984, and a range of 3484–4484.
